author: Daniel Paul (AI Trainer & Speaker)
title: How Solo Founders Run Their Entire LinkedIn Operation Inside Claude
patterns: Voice DNA: structured document defining who you are, sentence structure, word choice, hook patterns, proof rules, CTA format
Skill Commands: /post, /hook, /dm, /carousel, /follow-up as reusable Claude skills built once and triggered forever
AskUserQuestion: before composing, Claude interviews the user to ensure first draft lands better
1M Token Window: feed past 30 days of content as pattern reference before writing new content
Model Triage: Opus (deep thinking) → Sonnet (daily driver) → Haiku (repetitive/speed)
Tool Connectivity Map: what connects automatically (Apify, Gmail, Granola, Notion, Google Drive) vs manually (LinkedIn posting, DMs)
nebula_actions_taken: Expanded VOICE_DNA from 6-line skeleton to full Voice DNA document (7 sections: Who We Are, Sentence Structure, Word Choice, Hook Patterns, Proof Rules, CTA Format, Voice Examples, Enforcement)
Created 5 Nebula Skill Commands as reusable agent commands (/audit, /fix, /compose, /score, /followup) with full workflow definitions
Added AskUserQuestion pattern — pre-composition discovery requiring URL + pain + industry before composing
Created Tools Connectivity Map (auto vs manual) for Nebula's stack: Apify, AgentMail, Stripe, LinkedIn, Notion, Gmail
Updated load_strategy() to write all 12 project input files and return voice_dna + skills + ask_user_questions in strategy dict
Updated tests to assert all 12 files exist and new strategy keys are present
